# LinkedIn MCP

> An MCP (Model Context Protocol) server that gives AI assistants — Claude,
> Cursor, and any MCP client — access to LinkedIn as clean structured JSON.
> It drives a real stealth Chrome to clear Cloudflare, then queries LinkedIn's
> internal Voyager API from inside the authenticated page (same-origin) instead
> of scraping the DOM. 22 tools: reads plus gated writes. npm: `linkedin-mcp-tools`.

## What it does

- **Reads** (structured JSON): profiles (`get_profile`, `get_my_profile`),
  people/job/company search (`search_people`, `search_jobs`, `get_job_details`,
  `search_companies`, `get_company`, `get_company_posts`, `get_company_employees`),
  feed and notifications (`get_feed`, `get_notifications`), messaging
  (`get_inbox`, `get_conversation`), network (`get_pending_invitations`).
- **Writes** (gated behind `confirm:true` + daily caps, return a structured
  status): `connect_with_person`, `send_message`, `create_post`, `react_to_post`,
  `comment_on_post`. These POST directly to LinkedIn's API — the exact requests
  the web app sends, captured and verified live — not button-clicking.
- **Session/health**: `whoami`, `health_check`, `close_session`.

## Why it's different

- Hits LinkedIn's own Voyager API from inside a challenge-passed browser, so the
  data is structured and locale-independent (survives UI redesigns), and writes
  are real API calls with structured status codes, not brittle DOM clicks.
- Built-in safety layer: serial queue, human-paced delays, per-action daily caps,
  account warmup, and a circuit breaker that hard-stops on any checkpoint. Risk
  reduction, not a guarantee — no LinkedIn automation is ban-proof.

## Install

- One-time login (opens Chrome, sign in once): `npx -y linkedin-mcp-tools@latest --login`
- MCP client config: command `npx`, args `["-y","linkedin-mcp-tools@latest"]`
- Requires Google Chrome (or `npx patchright install chrome`).

## Links

- Repo: https://github.com/devag7/linkedin-mcp
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/linkedin-mcp-tools
- Setup guide: https://github.com/devag7/linkedin-mcp/blob/main/SETUP_GUIDE.md
- Safety/disclaimer: https://github.com/devag7/linkedin-mcp/blob/main/DISCLAIMER.md
